title: feat: add alibaba qwen image generation and editing models
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Qwen picks up a paintbrush
gist.blurb: Alibaba's Qwen models are now live for image generation and editing. Perfect for when your pixels need proper CJK text rendering or you want to mash up to three images together.
gist.summary: Integrated Alibaba's Qwen image generation and editing models into the API, bringing native CJK text rendering and multi-image editing support.
gist.impact: Developers can now route image generation and editing requests to qwen-image-plus and qwen-image-edit-plus via the standard endpoints.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot painting on a digital canvas. The canvas should feature CJK (Chinese/Japanese/Korean) characters to highlight the new text rendering capabilities. Polly wears a painter's beret.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, flying next to a chunky monitor robot who is painting glowing CJK characters on a digital canvas. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, flying next to a chunky monitor robot who is painting glowing CJK characters on a digital canvas. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
